title: Front Breaking Bashin Enters Stage!
overview: Toppa Bashin, who received a pendent with a red stone from his missing father, goes to meet the Battle Spirits champion J Sawaragi for a match.

title: The Rival's Name is J
overview: After his match against J, Bashin learns that he's a chosen card battler.

title: Parents Day in the Stormy Course of Life
overview: It's Parents Day at Toaru Elementary school, and one of the rumored Nazo-Otona appears.

title: The Idol is My Sunshine
overview: Popular idol My Sunshine disappears before a concert, and while searching for her, Bashin finds her alter-ego Suiren instead.

title: The Athletics Meet is Trouble
overview: Bashin and J's elementary schools face off at the athletics meet.

title: Card Battler Hospital Visit
overview: Striker feels useless while in the hospital, so he decides to learn Battle Spirits.

title: Shut up the Uproar
overview: Bashin and Striker are locked out of a My Sunshine performance.

title: Break Through From the Front at the Field Trip
overview: Bashin's class is going to Kyoto on a trip, but Meganeko is left behind.

title: Okyou's Labyrinth?
overview: J locks in the guests at a party in his Kyoto home to catch a Nazo-Otona.

title: Big Maze is Big Trouble
overview: In order to mend his relationship with his mother, J decides to give up Battle Spirits.

title: The Great Batosupi Operation
overview: My Sunshine announces on Battle Spirits TV that she doesn't like Battle Spirits.

title: Unidentified Unknown Invitation
overview: Bashin gives Siegfried to Striker, and goes off to try and win 100 battles without it.

title: Arrival of the Gunslinger's Apparition
overview: It's the day of the tournament, but Bashin is still in his room, sleeping.

title: First Final is Smile After Tears
overview: In the main tournament, Bashin and J make it to the final round.

title: A Faulted Perfect Christmas
overview: Bashin is planning a surprise for his school Christmas party.

title: The Day Aibou Disappeared
overview: After getting in a fight with Bashin over his deck, Aibou runs off.

title: My First Sunshine
overview: Suiren's true identity is revealed to be... an old lady?

title: Break Through From the Front in Winter
overview: While Meganeko plays detective, J invites Bashin and his friends to test a new battle system.

title: Thrilling Tag Rivals
overview: Elliott plans to open a Battle Spirits school in America.

title: A Broken Friendship is a Constant Disagreement
overview: On the last day of school, Bashin decides to ditch the surprise party his class planned for Card Sensei.

title: My Sunshine Valentine
overview: Noticing how off Bashin, who still hasn't apologized to Meganeko has been, Striker decides he needs Valentines chocolate to feel better.

title: Being a Nazo Otona was His Secret
overview: Meganeko starts her training under Card Sensei, where she chooses to be a yellow card battler.

title: Last Days as an Elementary Schooler
overview: Bashin wants to test his new X-Rare on J, but he's still acting strangely.

title: Spring Batosupi- A Yellow Storm
overview: Meganeko enters the spring tournament, disguised as the masked card battler Kiiroko.

title: A Flash of Light- The Cornerstone's Awakening
overview: If he can defeat Kiiroko, Bashin will get to face J again in the finals.

title: Batosupi Under the Sakura
overview: J throws a graduation party, and Bashin brings Kiiroko along to surprise his friends.

title: Pink and Amade Us
overview: My Sunshine is going through artists block, so her manager hires a music critic for her.

title: J- Trip to a Town of Romance
overview: Battle Spirits TV films a special at J's castle, which is rumored to be haunted.

title: Middle School Uniforms New School Uniforms
overview: Bashin and the others finally enter middle school, where both he and J find Numbers within their new schools.

title: Thriving Spirits Batosupi Club
overview: Bashin wants to join the Battle Spirits club, which may not even exist.

title: A Student Council for Batosupi
overview: My Sunshine learns that her new school lacks a Battle Spirits club, and tries to rectify that.

title: A Letter From the Speed Star
overview: Hayami wonders if she needs to let go of Bashin, when he'd rather spend time with his friends than her.

title: Aim for the Weak Point for the Advisor Too!
overview: The Battle Spirits club finds that they need an advisor to go on a trip for Golden Week.

title: The Treacherous Training Camp Jack
overview: At training camp, Striker becomes concerned at the lack of teamwork from his fellow club members.

title: Break Through From the Front of Tests and Fathers
overview: J's father is opposed to his son joining Numbers Elite, but doesn't know how to confront him about it.

title: Hot Blooded Batosupi Club at the Capital
overview: The Toaru and Tonari Battle Spirits clubs combine, to face Numbers Elite in Kyoto.

title: The Spirit of Aibou's Group
overview: While their owners are stuck taking tests, the pets decide to confront Okyou.

title: Rapid Loop Pool
overview: When My Sunshine is frustrated over her movie, Meganeko comes to her for help.

title: Deep Close Contact with the Opposing Team- The Curtain Raised?
overview: Bashin forms a team to get back J, but before the tournament, Seven defects.

title: Break Through- The Space Between Family and Team
overview: Suspicious of Masako's true identity, Striker confronts Elliott.

title: Confrontation! Black Knight and Queen will Definitely be Finished
overview: Bashin is set to face Jack Knight in the final round, but the order was suddenly changed.

title: Settlement- In Jack's Night, Death is Rebirth
overview: At last Bashin and Jack Knight battle, but King Uchuuchouten brings real spirits into the match.

title: The Revived Master is a Blue Comet
overview: Number Nine entrusts Number Eight the task of delivering invitations to the King Uchuuchouten Cup, as a test of loyalty.

title: Surfing, Sun and Striker
overview: While on a trip to the beach, Striker notices My Sunshine is acting strangely, so the pets convince him she must be in love with someone.

title: Break Through From the Front in Summer
overview: Meganeko finds a photo of her grandfather with King Uchuuchouten, along with a new X-Rare.

title: The Cornerstone Six- Disappearance the Day Before the Finals
overview: Realizing Number Nine's true intentions, Elliott and Kiano decide to try and stop him.

title: Break Through From the Front Showtime- The Curtain Raised!
overview: Before the King Uchuuchouten Cup begins, Card Sensei and the others look for the disappeared Masako Sensei.

title: The Last Opponent Nine- The Last Battle
overview: Striker and Suiren have one last secret weapon that could help defeat Number Nine.

title: Take it From the Life! Shine, Cornerstone's Settlement!!
overview: Bashin and J reveal their new X-Rare to defeat Seven and Smile.

title: Miracle Card Battler- Bashin Breaks Through From the Front!
overview: Both the real world and Isekai World are at risk in Bashin's battle with King Uchuuchouten.
